data.body: EPIC COMPLETE. All 5 stories closed across 6 commits (8ae4872 T2, 931b35c release-doc+probe, 45c4ae4 T1, b03d5a7 T3, ffe34ca T4, 0d0f859 T5). Canonical --output/-o flag everywhere (--json/--format removed); 21 JSON schemas (shared common.$defs) with a referencing-backed validator; every data-returning command emits structured JSON; MCP read tools advertise outputSchema; coverage guard enforces no structured output lacks a schema; docs/output-schemas.md documents the contract + source-of-truth. All format logic centralized in one Python module (ticket_output.py) per the no-duplicate-bash/Python principle. Full suite 1300 passed, 2 xfailed; live probe 141 passed. NOTE: deviation from the original 'back-compat aliases kept' AC — maintainer chose to DROP --json/--format entirely (pre-1.0 breaking change), which the survey + convention research supported.
